headline: Strategic angle — Announce enhanced BRSR and GRI-aligned tax transparency to restore ESG fund confidence and preempt index exclusion
what_matters: GST Act Section 73 demand; GRI:207-1, ESRS E1 triggers; risk of additional penalties if precedent set.
ESG score gap on tax transparency (GRI:207-1, BRSR:P5:Q12) vs YES Bank and IDFC First Bank; risk of index exclusion if unresolved.
Reputational impact may affect talent attraction and retention in compliance and finance roles; minor community trust erosion.
action: Strategic opportunity: Announce enhanced BRSR and GRI-aligned tax transparency to restore ESG fund confidence and preempt index exclusion
Competitive position: ICICI Bank at disadvantage vs YES Bank (no recent tax penalties) and IDFC First Bank (stronger BRSR tax disclosure)
